messages.content: 帮我把联系表单提交一下。
ASK_USER "Please provide the official website URL and the form values to fill, such as name, email, and message."
帮我登录官网然后看一下 dashboard。
ASK_USER "Please provide the login page URL, username, and password. If I should enter a specific page after login, please provide that path too."
帮我把职位列表抓下来。
ASK_USER "Please provide the page URL, or tell me which website/page I should open first."
Check 最近的 Apple 新品消息。
ASK_USER "Which website should I use, or should I use a general search engine?"
进去后 click 一下 continue。
ASK_USER "Please provide the page URL and specify which button or target element you want me to interact with."
帮我看看 app.demo-site.test/login 的登录按钮为什么点不了，先检查按钮状态和输入框情况。

browser navigate https://app.demo-site.test/login
browser screenshot
browser observe "Find the login button and report whether it is enabled or disabled"
browser observe "Find the username and password input fields and whether they are required"
browser close
Check why the submit button is not working on forms.example.org/register and collect evidence for debugging.

browser navigate https://forms.example.org/register
browser screenshot
browser observe "Find all buttons and their states"
browser observe "Find all form input fields and their required status"
browser act "Fill in all required fields with test data"
browser screenshot
browser observe "Check if the submit button is now enabled"
browser close
把这个 CSV 文件下载下来：static.example.net/data/inventory.csv

browser navigate https://static.example.net/data/inventory.csv
browser act "Wait for 5 seconds for the download to complete"
browser close
把这个 PDF 文件下载下来：static.example.net/manuals/setup-guide.pdf

browser navigate https://static.example.net/manuals/setup-guide.pdf
browser act "Wait for 5 seconds for the download to complete"
browser close
Please visit Product Hunt and pull the first 5 headlines with links from the homepage.

browser navigate https://www.producthunt.com/
browser extract "Extract the top 5 post titles and URLs from the homepage" '{"posts":[{"title":"string","url":"string"}]}'
browser close
到 Wired AI 把最新 5 条科技新闻信息抓出来，I’ll summarize them later.

browser navigate https://www.wired.com/tag/artificial-intelligence/
browser extract "Extract the top 5 article headlines and their summaries" '{"articles":[{"headline":"string","summary":"string","author":"string","publishedDate":"string"}]}'
browser close
Open example.com/product/618 and extract the product name, price, currency, stock status.

browser navigate https://example.com/product/618
browser extract "Extract the product information" '{"productName":"string","price":"number","currency":"string","inStock":"boolean"}'
browser close
打开 GitHub 上的 huggingface/transformers 仓库首页，把仓库名、简介和 star 数抓出来。

browser navigate https://github.com/huggingface/transformers
browser extract "Extract the repository name, short description, and star count" '{"repository":"string","description":"string","stars":"string"}'
browser close

Fill out the contact form at https://support.example.org/contact-us with name Sophie Wu, email alice@example.com, and message 'I want to ask about your refund policy'. Submit it and take a screenshot afterward.

browser navigate https://support.example.org/contact-us
browser act "Fill in the name field with 'Sophie Wu'"
browser act "Fill in the email field with 'alice@example.com'"
browser act "Fill in the message field with 'I want to ask about your refund policy'"
browser act "Click the Submit button"
browser screenshot
browser close
去 example.com/feedback 帮我 submit feedback form：name Emma Li，email emma.li@example.com，message 写 The checkout page is confusing。 提交后截图。

browser navigate https://example.com/feedback
browser act "Fill in the name field with 'Emma Li'"
browser act "Fill in the email field with 'emma.li@example.com'"
browser act "Fill in the message field with 'The checkout page is confusing'"
browser act "Click the Submit button"
browser screenshot
browser close
帮我在 updates.example.org/subscribe 这个 newsletter 页面填邮箱 emma.li@example.com 并提交。

browser navigate https://updates.example.org/subscribe
browser act "Fill in the email field with 'emma.li@example.com'"
browser act "Click the Subscribe button"
browser close
打开 MDN 首页，list 一下顶部导航菜单，再 check 有没有 visible login button。

browser navigate https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/
browser observe "List the top navigation menu items"
browser observe "Check whether there is a visible login button on the page"
browser close
Please sign in to portal.example.org using ops_demo / demo1234 and navigate to the dashboard. Grab a screenshot once you're there.

browser navigate https://portal.example.org/sign-in
browser act "Fill in the username field with 'ops_demo'"
browser act "Fill in the password field with 'demo1234'"
browser act "Click the Login button"
browser act "Wait for the page to fully load"
browser navigate https://portal.example.org/dashboard
browser screenshot
browser close
Help me think through the project risks.
CANNOT_EXECUTE "not_browser_task"
帮我顺手修一下这段 Python 代码里的 bug。
CANNOT_EXECUTE "not_browser_task"
帮我算一下这个方程：2x + 5 = 17。
CANNOT_EXECUTE "not_browser_task"
Condense this text into three bullet points.
CANNOT_EXECUTE "not_browser_task"
帮我把这段中文翻成英文。
CANNOT_EXECUTE "not_browser_task"
Open the OpenAI pricing page and take a screenshot.

browser navigate https://openai.com/pricing
browser screenshot
browser close
把 shop.example.org/catalog 前 4 页的商品信息都抓出来。

browser navigate https://shop.example.org/catalog
browser extract "Extract all products on this page" '{"products":[{"name":"string","price":"number","imageUrl":"string"}]}'
browser act "Click the Next Page button"
browser extract "Extract all products on this page" '{"products":[{"name":"string","price":"number","imageUrl":"string"}]}'
browser act "Click the Next Page button"
browser extract "Extract all products on this page" '{"products":[{"name":"string","price":"number","imageUrl":"string"}]}'
browser act "Click the Next Page button"
browser extract "Extract all products on this page" '{"products":[{"name":"string","price":"number","imageUrl":"string"}]}'
browser close
Extract all job titles and locations from the first 2 pages on careers.example.org/openings.

browser navigate https://careers.example.org/openings
browser extract "Extract all job titles and locations on this page" '{"jobs":[{"jobTitle":"string","location":"string"}]}'
browser act "Click the Next Page button"
browser extract "Extract all job titles and locations on this page" '{"jobs":[{"jobTitle":"string","location":"string"}]}'
browser close
打开 Bing，搜一下 openai python sdk github，点开第 1 条结果，把页面的page title and the first two introductory paragraphs抓出来。

browser navigate https://www.bing.com
browser act "Type 'openai python sdk github' in the search box and press Enter"
browser act "Wait for search results to load"
browser act "Click the 1st search result"
browser act "Wait for the page to fully load"
browser extract "Extract the page title and the first two introductory paragraphs" '{"pageTitle":"string","introParagraph1":"string","introParagraph2":"string"}'
browser close
去 Bing 搜一下 LoRA fine tuning tutorial，把前 6 条结果抓出来。

browser navigate https://www.bing.com
browser act "Type 'LoRA fine tuning tutorial' in the search box and press Enter"
browser act "Wait for search results to load"
browser extract "Extract the top 6 search results" '{"results":[{"title":"string","url":"string","snippet":"string"}]}'
browser close
到 docs.langchain.com/ 站内搜 authentication，把前 4 条标题、链接和摘要抓出来。

browser navigate https://docs.langchain.com/
browser act "Type 'authentication' in the documentation search box and press Enter"
browser act "Wait for search results to load"
browser extract "Extract the top 4 search results" '{"results":[{"title":"string","url":"string","snippet":"string"}]}'
browser close
Search YouTube for 'vector database explained' and extract the top 5 video titles and channel names.

browser navigate https://www.youtube.com/
browser act "Type 'vector database explained' in the search box and press Enter"
browser act "Wait for search results to load"
browser extract "Extract the top 5 video titles and their channel names" '{"videos":[{"title":"string","channel":"string"}]}'
browser close
